system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括：
- digest 计划（facet、story_keys、editorial_angle、article_ids）
- story 级约束摘要
- 对应的 article 摘要与正文

你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 必须沿着 editorial_angle 组织叙事
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["364c2ac0-a6bc-4759-9a7a-e65bebbafc18", "2d756d1e-6449-4b4c-b6ab-ae051188e43f", "2290a14b-a43e-47e7-99dd-38eb29495e6f"], "article_ids": ["7cf424c7-9f0e-48ea-b0a0-28e7740ea090", "cceae92f-8553-4f84-a69d-274797c2c7ce", "f82a5460-244f-439b-b058-21f3fa50f78c"], "editorial_angle": "品牌通过设计师联名、传统工艺合作与渠道独占策略构建差异化产品叙事", "source_names": ["ELLE China", "GQ", "WWD"]}, "story_summaries": [{"story_key": "364c2ac0-a6bc-4759-9a7a-e65bebbafc18", "synopsis_zh": "Zara's collaboration with red-hot designer Willy Chavarria just dropped", "event_type": "collaboration_launch"}, {"story_key": "2d756d1e-6449-4b4c-b6ab-ae051188e43f", "synopsis_zh": "在与Chiricahua Apache Nation匠人Neil Zarama的合作中，手工锻造皮带扣与镶嵌绿松石的银质珠宝贯穿两系列。该合作是Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦匠人计划（Authentic Makers Program）的一部分", "event_type": "craftsmanship_collaboration"}, {"story_key": "2290a14b-a43e-47e7-99dd-38eb29495e6f", "synopsis_zh": "Sunglass Hut is sharpening its positioning with an exclusive capsule from Ray-Ban, underscoring limited-edition product as a bellwether for retail differentiation.", "event_type": "brand_collaboration"}], "source_articles": [{"article_id": "7cf424c7-9f0e-48ea-b0a0-28e7740ea090", "source_name": "GQ", "title_raw": "Zara and Willy Chavarria Unveil a Fully Realized Menswear Universe", "summary_raw": "Zara's collaboration with red-hot designer Willy Chavarria just dropped. Here's what we're buying, from brawny denim jackets to zoot suit-adjacent tailoring.", "body_markdown": "# Zara and Willy Chavarria Unveil a Fully Realized Menswear Universe

Zara's collaboration with red-hot designer Willy Chavarria just dropped. Here's what we're buying, from brawny denim jackets to zoot suit-adjacent tailoring.

Over the last few years, Zara has assembled a corps d’elite of design talent to bolster its fashion-world pedigree, collaborating with longtime industry heavyweights like Stefano Pilati and behind-the-scenes savants like Aaron Levine. As of today, that buzzy Rolodex also includes Willy Chavarria, the SoCal-raised, Mexican-American designer whose vision of Chicano-influenced menswear has never looked more urgent.

VATÍSIMO, the designer’s first collaboration with the Spanish retail giant, is deeply rooted in perennial Chavarria influences—community and camaraderie are never far from his mind—including the singular style of some of the best-dressed men on the planet: his customers.

The Willy Chavarria man, the designer tells GQ, is “someone who leads with humanity. He’s strong, but also vulnerable. He understands style as a form of expression, not status.” So what better way to promote the collaboration than with a telenovela? Directed by Glen Luchford in conjunction with Chavarria himself, the high-drama short film features supermodel Christy Turlington and actor Alberto Guerra quarreling their way through a thorny love quadrangle, decked out in head-to-toe Chavarria throughout, of course.

That’s no mere figure of speech—VATÍSIMO really is a head-to-toe effort, spanning workwear-inspired denim shirts and louche trousers worthy of a vacation south of the border, but also jewelry, accessories, and at least one pair of razzle-dazzle patent leather loafers. Signature Williyisms abound, from broad-shouldered bomber jackets sliced into vests to brawny, zoot suit-adjacent tailoring—all hallmarks of Chavarria’s universe, cinematic or otherwise.

“The zoot suit has always carried a deep cultural and political weight,” Chavarria says. “It represents resistance, identity, and a kind of unapologetic presence taking up space in a world that often tries to minimize you,” Chavarria says. “Fashion moves in cycles, but for me, that makes the zoot suit language even more important. I’m drawn to volume, and to the silhouettes that feel powerful but also human.”

Unlike collaborations composed of a paltry dozen or so designs, Chavarria’s inaugural tie-up with Zara boasts nearly a hundred distinct pieces—enough for a full runway presentation. “From the beginning, it felt important to create something complete,” he says. “My work is about building a world, not just offering individual pieces. To communicate that properly, it needed to feel like a full expression of the brand.”

The full VATÍSIMO collection is available today, March 26, at Zara.com and in select Zara stores around the world.
"}, {"article_id": "cceae92f-8553-4f84-a69d-274797c2c7ce", "source_name": "ELLE China", "title_raw": "续写隽永华章 领略绅士风尚 拉夫劳伦重回米兰演绎2026秋季男装系列", "summary_raw": "2026年1月16日，Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦于意大利米兰Palazzo Ralph Lauren，真挚呈献Ralph Lauren Men’s及Polo Ralph Lauren 2026秋季系列。", "body_markdown": "# 续写隽永华章 领略绅士风尚 拉夫劳伦重回米兰演绎2026秋季男装系列

2026年1月16日，Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦于意大利米兰Palazzo Ralph Lauren，真挚呈献Ralph Lauren Men’s及Polo Ralph Lauren 2026秋季系列。

自品牌创立伊始，Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦始终以经典学院风范、摩登运动格调与隽永优雅气韵为灵感，诠释本真美式风格。

“我的风格之旅始于一条领带，但它从不止是一件配饰，而是一种生活方式。当我涉足男装设计，便深深着迷于隽永传统，却从未被其所缚。我的创作，始终流淌在我所塑造的多样风格与意境之中。2026秋季系列的灵感，源自当代男性的多元生活方式、鲜明的个性与个人风格的表达。从Ralph Lauren Men’s浑然天成的优雅气度，到Polo系列焕新演绎的学院精神，它们皆映射出我所信奉并生活的世界。”

——拉夫·劳伦

大秀以Polo Ralph Lauren 2026秋季系列启幕，在现代视角下重绎品牌传承与经典美式工装。标志性实用单品，借由独到面料搭配焕然一新；拉绒羊毛针织衫、绗缝外套等经典款式，以鲜活色彩与大胆比例崭新呈现；Polo以张弛有度的剪裁哲学，传递当代语境下的精致内核；源自Heritage系列的包袋与Alpine靴，则以细腻工艺为造型点睛。本季亦通过品牌“驻场艺术家（Artist in Residence）”项目，携手Oceti Sakowin设计师Jocy与Trae Little Sky，共同推出Polo Ralph Lauren x TÓPA联名新作，将北部平原（Northern Plains）美学风格融入系列设计肌理之中。

Ralph Lauren Men’s系列秉持着对优雅廓形、实用功能与本真质感的执着追求，于本季展露出一份从容的精致气度。运动外衣甄选细腻羊绒面料，以奢华双面工艺织就；功能性外衣以精准剪裁诠释现代绅士风度；手工西装与晚礼服，于细节中彰显非凡专注，每一处皆是对隽永风格的奢华礼赞。

在与Chiricahua Apache Nation匠人Neil Zarama的合作中，手工锻造皮带扣与镶嵌绿松石的银质珠宝贯穿两系列。该合作是Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦匠人计划（Authentic Makers Program）的一部分，旨在携手传统手工匠人，共同创作承载文化记忆的精致作品。

大秀以品牌标志性设计语言与美学风格，勾勒出Ralph Lauren男装生活方式的完整图景，续写超越时间的优雅风范与隽永魅力。

秀场内星光熠熠，演员梁家辉（Tony Leung Ka Fai）、演员及导演张家辉（Nick Cheung）、演员及歌手魏浚笙（Jeffrey Ngai）、歌手李马克（Mark Lee）、演员及制作人汤姆·希德勒斯顿（Tom Hiddleston）、演员利亚姆·海莫斯沃斯（Liam Hemsworth）、歌手尼克·乔纳斯（Nick Jonas）、演员诺亚·施纳普（Noah Schnapp）等全球名流受邀出席，沉浸式感受Ralph Lauren拉夫劳伦男装世界的多样魅力。
"}, {"article_id": "f82a5460-244f-439b-b058-21f3fa50f78c", "source_name": "WWD", "title_raw": "Sunglass Hut Bets on Ray-Ban Exclusive Capsule", "summary_raw": "The Ray-Ban Sunglass Hut collection will launch globally across locations beginning March 30, with a dedicated U.S. rollout in July.", "body_markdown": "# Sunglass Hut Bets on Ray-Ban Exclusive Capsule

The Ray-Ban Sunglass Hut collection will launch globally across locations beginning March 30, with a dedicated U.S. rollout in July.

Updated 4:37 p.m. ET on March 27

Sunglass Hut is sharpening its positioning with an exclusive capsule from Ray-Ban, underscoring limited-edition product as a bellwether for retail differentiation.

“Exclusive product is a critical lever in reinforcing Sunglass Hut’s authority within premium sun,” said Filippo Resini, president of sun retail at EssilorLuxottica. The capsule, he added, creates “a unified global retail statement while offering differentiated product to our customers.”

The collection will launch globally across Sunglass Hut locations beginning Monday. The four-style assortment reworks core Ray-Ban silhouettes with white-frame and gray-lens color story, with two styles exclusive to Sunglass Hut: the Zena and Mega Wayfarer II.

You May Also Like

Both brands are part of the EssilorLuxottica stable and the partnership builds on Ray-Ban’s place as “one of the most important brands” of Sunglass Hut’s assortment, the executive said, while reinforcing a broader strategy of the importance of exclusivity in-store.

“Consumers expect discovery when they walk into a store,” Filippo said, pointing to the growing importance of special collections and in-store experiences that feel unique to Sunglass Hut, while keeping the assortment constantly evolving.

The special collection itself reflects current momentum in the category. Familiar Ray-Ban shapes are “pushed” toward bolder proportions, aligning with the current demand for oversize, statement-making eyewear. The Mega Wayfarer II, for instance, amplifies one of the brand’s most recognizable frames with “scale and attitude.”

White frames were selected for their visual impact in store, while gray polarized lenses ground the frame, keeping it “clean and versatile while still making a statement,” Filippo said. The Sunglass Hut-only styles feature dedicated Ray-Ban x Sunglass Hut co-branded packaging, developed specifically for the collaboration.

Consumers increasingly treat sunglasses as a fashion accessory, rather than just a seasonal purchase and with a retail footprint of more than 2,500 locations worldwide, the retailer stands as a multibrand one-stop shop.

“Sunglass Hut plays a unique role as a curator,” Filippo said. “Consumers come to us because they can discover the best eyewear brands in one place, compare styles across brands and find the pair that fits their personal style.”

Ray-Ban is navigating a renewed cultural moment with the appointment of A$AP Rocky as creative director, signaling a deeper alignment with fashion, music and youth culture — repositioning it beyond heritage into something even more directional.

The capsule will be supported with in-store installations, alongside digital activations spanning e-commerce, CRM and social channels. Consumers in select markets will have access to a QR-enabled style quiz — available both in-store and online — which will offer personalized Ray-Ban recommendations, adding an interactive layer.

Pricing ranges from 137 to 223 euros globally and $160 to $255 in the U.S.
